title: Linking Make.com Webhooks to Monday.com
excerpt: I have created a webhook on make.com. When I attempt to integrate it to my board, it’s asking for a webhook url link, but I’m not finding this link on the make.com webhook board. What’s the link they are looking for? How…

posts.author: adithya-krishna (Adithya Krishna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a webhook on make.com. When I attempt to integrate it to my board, it’s asking for a webhook url link, but I’m not finding this link on the make.com webhook board. What’s the link they are looking for? How do I generate it on Make.com.

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @adithya-krishna,

I found this topic where it is explained how to do this with Make.

I just followed the instructions by the user “timlittletech” and it worked like a charm

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

When you right click on the monday.com watch events module you will get a pop up that has the option if copying the webhook to your clipboard. See screenshot attached.

image1187×646 65.4 KB

Hope this helps.

posts.author: adithya-krishna (Adithya Krishna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Thank you for this. Do I need to subscribe to make.com to view this box? When I link my api to this make.com it doesn’t show me this option.

Screenshot 2023-09-26 at 8.32.57 AM910×594 46.4 KB

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Can you send a screenshot of the module you are using?

You should be using the monday “watch events” module in order to get webhooks.

posts.author: adithya-krishna (Adithya Krishna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Joseph,

Thank you! This solved the issue.

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @JHconsultancy for the help here!
